questionHtml: Outline which pKa value should be used when calculating the pH of the solution, giving your reason.
markschemeHtml:
pKa2 AND pH of solution > pH of isoelectric point «as anion present»
OR
pKa2 AND zwitterion has lost H+ to become anion «so in basic solution»
OR
pKa2 AND «only» anion «and zwitterion» present   [✔]

meta.title: Outline which pKa value should be used when calculating the pH of the solution, giving your reason.
